description: Add persistent task statuses with badges, controls, and filtering.

userStories.title: Add persistent task status storage
userStories.description: As a team member, I want every task to store a status with a pending default so task progress persists consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Task records store one of pending, in_progress, or done.
Existing tasks default to pending after the change.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add shared task status type and validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a shared task status definition so task status values stay consistent across persistence and application logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared task status type exposes pending, in_progress, and done values.
Validation rejects unsupported status values before persistence.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Persist task status updates
userStories.description: As a team member, I want task status changes to save reliably so task progress remains accurate after refresh or navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Application updates stored task status when a valid status change request is submitted.
Invalid status updates return a validation error without mutating data.
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show status badges on task cards
userStories.description: As a team member, I want each task card to show its current status so I can scan work progress quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task card displays a visible badge for pending, in progress, or done.
Badge text matches the stored task status for every rendered task.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add task status control to task list
userStories.description: As a team member, I want to change a task status from the task list so I can update progress without leaving the list view.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list exposes pending, in progress, and done status options for each task.
Changing the control updates the rendered task to the newly saved status.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter task list by status
userStories.description: As a team member, I want to filter the task list by status so I can focus on tasks in one state at a time.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list offers All, Pending, In Progress, and Done filter options.
Selecting a filter shows only tasks that match the chosen status, except All which shows every task.
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
